hypothesis: If a frozen molecular LLM’s hidden states are perturbed during generation by linear combinations of property-specific embeddings learned via a concept bottleneck (CAST), then it will more accurately satisfy single- and multi-property targets (lower MAE/Best100MAE) across in- and out-of-distribution settings without degrading validity, generative efficiency, novelty, or synthetic accessibility relative to vanilla, ActAdd, full fine-tuning, and LoRA, because the bottleneck learns disentangled, approximately orthogonal directions that compose linearly in the model’s activation space.
